name: Yixing

skills.name: Maintaining Initiative
skills.description: Basic Attacks deal magical damage. For every 4 skill hits on the same enemy, generates a Weiqi stone that deals magical damage and adds to the total number of Weiqi stones. Upon taking fatal damage, gains brief immunity to all damage and increased Movement Speed.

skills.name: Sliding Stones
skills.description:
Places a Weiqi stone at the target location, gaining vision and damaging enemies.
Weiqi stones will be pulled into Skill 2's Weiqi formation, damaging and slowing enemies in their path.

skills.name: Taking Liberties
skills.description: Deals damage to the target area and creates a Weiqi formation. The formation pulls enemies toward its center, damaging them in the process.

skills.name: The World is My Board
skills.description: Draws a Weiqi board that launches enemies and places marks on them while exposing their location. Enemies caught within the Weiqi board are bound and will be unable to leave. Gains Movement Speed while forming the board.

skillsZh.name: 氣合
skillsZh.description: 普攻造成傷害，技能命中敵人四次後生成棋子造成傷害，並累積棋子數。受到致命傷害會短暫免疫所有傷害並提升移速。

skillsZh.name: 飛攻
skillsZh.description:
向指定位置放置棋子，獲得視野，並對敵人造成傷害。
棋子會被吸入2技能形成的棋陣中，對沿途敵人造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 鎮神
skillsZh.description: 弈星對指定區域造成傷害並擴散棋陣，同時將周圍敵人向棋陣中心吸引，造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 萬變之局
skillsZh.description: 弈星畫出棋盤，成型後擊飛棋盤內目標並疊加印記，暴露行蹤，棋盤內的敵人被束縛無法離開。棋盤成型期間，弈星獲得加速。

tips: Build: Frozen Breath, Venomous Staff, Mask of Agony.
tipsZh: 弈星（中路）：梯度 B，勝率 51.84%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：凝冰之息、夢魘之牙、痛苦面具.

faqs.question: Is Yixing good in current season?
faqs.answer: Yixing is Tier B Mage with 51.84% win rate, 0.69% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Yixing build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Frozen Breath, Venomous Staff, Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath, Insatiable Tome, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Yixing?
faqs.answer: Pick Allain, Dharma, Dian Wei. Strong into Augran, Cirrus, Lam.

faqsZh.question: 弈星 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 弈星 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.84%、選取 0.69%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 弈星 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：凝冰之息、夢魘之牙、痛苦面具、博學者之怒、噬神之書、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 弈星？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Allain、Dharma、Dian Wei。弈星 克制 Augran、Cirrus、Lam。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Augran, Cirrus, Lam. Weak into: Allain, Dharma, Dian Wei.

guide.overview: Yixing is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.8% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yixing: Basic Attacks deal magical damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of Tranquility, Savant's Wrath, then complete Breakthrough Robe, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Yixing's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Sliding Stones → Taking Liberties → The World is My Board → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → The World is My Board (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Sliding Stones, and The World is My Board on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Sliding Stones → Taking Liberties → The World is My Board → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Yixing is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.
comparisons: Yixing vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Yixing has +0.7% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Yixing when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Yixing vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.1% more often globally. Choose Yixing when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Yixing excels into Augran, Cirrus, Lam. Avoid blind picking into Allain, Dharma, Dian Wei without team peel.
